name: Guerrini Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except oil and chicken in a bowl.
2. Add the chicken wings to the mixture and marinate overnight in the refrigerator, stirring occasionally to ensure even coating.
3. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy pot to 375°F (190°C).
4. Fry the chicken wings until golden brown, turning occasionally, for about 10-12 minutes.
